legacy_lexicon: the Hall of the Thousand Yous

default_binding.HERO: a child of the opera house crew
default_binding.GOAL: records that clear your family's name
default_binding.ST18_ROOM: the Hall of the Thousand Yous
default_binding.WIN_CLEAN: the dark mirror that shows nothing

slots.meaning: The unnamed second-person protagonist's role/identity.
slots.guidance: A single teen protagonist role, kid-relatable and capable but not reckless; second person keeps them unnamed.

slots.meaning: What the hero is descending the labyrinth to reach/recover.
slots.guidance: A tangible prize or proof that matters to the hero's life outside the labyrinth; positive, non-violent.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, lethal place the gauntlet happens inside.
slots.guidance: A single sealed structure of sequential rooms; wonder-and-dread, no toxic/unbreathable air as a scripted hazard.

slots.meaning: The single sealing entry point the hero passes with no return.
slots.guidance: A door/hatch/gate that closes behind the hero at the very start; the one-way threshold into the gauntlet.

slots.meaning: The named chamber/checkpoint the hero reaches at station 1 of 18.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative room name (a proper-noun-style chamber title) establishing this checkpoint's flavor before its rule is explained.

slots.meaning: The staff figure/agent who takes the hero into custody on the capture-branch of station 1 (a non-lethal outcome).
slots.guidance: A single staff-role captor (never armed, never violent beyond seizing/holding); the capture is a locked room, not harm.

slots.meaning: The named chamber/checkpoint the hero reaches at station 2 of 18.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative room name (a proper-noun-style chamber title) establishing this checkpoint's flavor before its rule is explained.

slots.meaning: The unmarked exit route naming the success ending.
slots.guidance: A safe-looking way out that is exactly what it appears; positive, no injury, no violence.

slots.meaning: The quicker but injuring exit route naming a completion ending.
slots.guidance: A faster way out with a minor, survivable cost (a scrape, a scare); never graphic, never a weapon.

slots.meaning: The unseen exit route naming a completion ending.
slots.guidance: A discreet, unnoticed way out; positive, no injury.
